jobs.prompt: Pixel art item icon sheet: exactly 4 decorative item icons arranged in a single horizontal row, 4 equal-width columns, one icon per column, generous empty magenta space between and around them, no drop shadows on the background. Each icon is a single object drawn front-facing, centered, large and bold like a collectible card illustration, all in identical style and size: (1) a yellow wooden pencil with a pink eraser end and sharp graphite tip, standing diagonally, (2) a ripe yellow banana crescent with small brown tips, (3) a shiny golden five-pointed star with a glossy highlight, (4) a brown acorn with a cross-hatched cap and tiny stem.
